theme_and_archetype.vibe: Military HUD, mission router, network integrity panels, glassmorphic dark panels with subtle cyan grid lines. Tactical, surgical, command-center aesthetic. Deterministic, Autonomous, Substrate.

headlines.usage: Headers, mission critical alerts, panel titles

body.usage: Standard UI text, chat panel, file tree

monospace.usage: Code editor, terminal, HUD telemetry numbers, micro-stats, git hashes

surface_strategies.panels: Deep midnight background (#050709) with 1px solid steel (#0B0F14) or translucent cyan borders (e.g., border-[#00D9FF]/20).
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Used sparingly for modals/overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050709]/80 border border-[#00D9FF]/30).
surface_strategies.texture: Apply a subtle SVG noise/grain overlay at 3% opacity globally over dark backgrounds.
surface_strategies.corners: Sharp edges, maximum 2px to 4px border radius. Never use pill shapes (rounded-full) for buttons.
surface_strategies.selection_focus: 1px cyan inset ring (ring-1 ring-inset ring-[#00D9FF]). NEVER use browser default blue.
surface_strategies.dividers: Thin 1px cyan dividers with low opacity (border-[#00D9FF]/15).

animation_rules.motion: Deterministic and precise. No bouncy/spring effects.
animation_rules.interactions: Hover states should immediately highlight with a cyan tint or 1px border. Status changes should briefly flash a 1px cyan stroke.

icons.style: Sharp, technical, line-based. Use icon glyphs (✓ / ✗ / ⚠) in Viridian/Orange/Alloy Gray for states, never emojis.

logos.description: Angular shard 'S' emblem in steel-cyan gradient

backgrounds.description: Dark tactical HUD background with midnight steel palette and subtle cyan grids

sign_in_landing.layout: Centered mission-control login card over tactical_hud_bg.
sign_in_landing.elements: Sovereign Shards logo, 'DEPLOY THE SHARD' CTA button (sharp, cyan border), Google OAuth button.
sign_in_landing.footer: Brand pillars row: 'SOVEREIGN INFRASTRUCTURE · LOCAL AUTONOMY · VERIFIABLE EXECUTION' in tiny monospace.
sign_in_landing.slogans: Include 'IF IT CAN'T PROVE INTEGRITY, IT HALTS.' as an overline.

main_ide_shell.top_bar: Project switcher dropdown, Gauntlet Status indicator (5/5 dots in Viridian), Run/Stop buttons (sharp), Live Preview toggle, User avatar. Border bottom 1px steel.
main_ide_shell.left_rail: Vertical icon stack (Files, Git, Search, Five Masters, AI Coworker). Active icon glows cyan.
main_ide_shell.file_tree: Collapsible folders. Each file has a tiny Five Masters score badge (e.g., '5/5' in Viridian or '3/5' in Orange) aligned to the right.
main_ide_shell.editor_center: Monaco editor area. Multi-tab bar at top. Each tab shows the filename and a mini-Gauntlet score.
main_ide_shell.right_panel: AI Coworker. Tabs: Chat (Gemini) / Refine (GPT-5.2) / Gauntlet (Claude Sonnet 4.5) / Logs. IBM Plex Sans for chat bubbles, monospace for logs.
main_ide_shell.bottom_panel: Split view: Integrated Terminal (xterm.js styled with JetBrains Mono, cyan prompt) and Problems panel. Resizable border.

five_masters_panel.layout: Grid list of 5 named masters: Korotkevich, Torvalds, Carmack, Hamilton, Ritchie.
five_masters_panel.indicators: Each has a pass/fail icon (✓ Viridian, ✗ Orange).
five_masters_panel.content: Severity-color coded issue list below failed masters. 'RE-EVALUATE' ghost button with cyan text and 1px border.

inline_ai_edit_modal.trigger: Cmd+K floating glass panel over editor.
inline_ai_edit_modal.stages: 1. Instruction input (cyan prompt). 2. Diff preview (Red/Green line backgrounds). 3. 'Gauntlet Review' verdict block. Apply/Reject sharp buttons.

hard_block_modal.style: Full-screen amber/orange (#FF6A1A/10) interlock screen overlay. 2px solid #FF6A1A borders.
hard_block_modal.headline: 'INTEGRITY HALT — VERIFICATION REQUIRED' in Exo 2 Black, colored Orange.
hard_block_modal.content: Password input field (sharp, red/orange focus ring), override log, hard-edged 'OVERRIDE' button.

live_preview_pane.controls: URL bar (read-only style), refresh icon, device toggle (desktop/mobile) in a compact top bar.

git_panel.layout: Standard source control view but tactical.
git_panel.elements: Branches dropdown. Staged/Unstaged diff list. Commit message textarea (monospace). Push button.

hud_adornments.description: Treat surface as mission control. Add thin cyan dividers, HUD tick marks in corners.
hud_adornments.telemetry: Micro-numbers in corners (e.g., 'UPTIME: 99.9%', 'AST: OK') using JetBrains Mono text-[10px] text-[#7D8597].

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.
